sources.title: Ridgeline Studio operating notes
sources.summary: How Ridgeline Studio runs during the Skylark 1.0 launch window: one gate at a time, every durable change through the review queue, cockpit stays read-only.

sources.title: Skylark user-guide draft import
sources.summary: Imported draft of the Skylark weather-journal user guide: daily loop, tab meanings, proof rules for judging launch readiness, and v1.0 limits.

sources.title: Routine intake capture
sources.summary: Messy bullets from the studio pair describing the launch-week cadence: standup, feedback triage, support digest, ship review, and monthly books.

sources.title: Playtest feedback synthesis, round one
sources.summary: Synthesis of 25 beta playtest sessions for Skylark: onboarding friction, the units-toggle confusion (finding C002), and the morning journaling pattern.

sources.title: Skylark pricing decision worksheet
sources.summary: Options and margins for Skylark 1.0 pricing: one-time purchase, subscription, and freemium tip-jar paths, with the locked one-time recommendation.

sources.title: App-store submission checklist
sources.summary: Step-by-step store submission checklist for Skylark 1.0: listing assets, privacy labels, review notes, dry run, and the 2026-06-24 submission cutoff.

sources.title: Beta survey results, round one
sources.summary: Aggregated beta survey results: 21 of 25 responses, morning journaling majority, top feature requests, and willingness-to-pay signal for one-time pricing.

sources.title: Website and docs copy review
sources.summary: Copy review pass over ridgeline.example and the Skylark docs: quickstart gaps, pricing page wording, and changelog page plan.

sources.title: Support inbox digest, week 26
sources.summary: Weekly support digest: 14 beta tickets, top themes (units toggle fixed, reminder timing, export requests), and reply-macro coverage.

sources.title: Launch-week readiness review
sources.summary: Final readiness review before the store submission gate: verification status of the launch demo package, open risks, and the parked Daily Operations decision.
